# Madison Funeral Home — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Madison Funeral Home is a full-service funeral provider located in Madison, NY, offering compassionate end-of-life services including casket selection, floral arrangements, candles, and video tributes. The business operates across multiple locations and features a dedicated funeral team. Their website would need to reflect dignity, warmth, and trust, with key features like obituary listings and service information for grieving families.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Madison Funeral Home provides compassionate funeral services in Madison, NY. From casket selection to floral arrangements, we guide families with warmth and trust. Begin planning a heartfelt tribute today.

### Obituaries
https://example.com/obituaries
Browse recent obituaries and honor loved ones with Madison Funeral Home. Find service details, share memories, and light a candle of remembrance. View tributes and join a community of support today.

### Services
https://example.com/services
Discover tailored funeral services at Madison Funeral Home, including caskets, floral designs, video tributes, and memorial planning. Let our team create a dignified, healing farewell. Explore options now.

### Locations & Team
https://example.com/locations-team
Connect with the compassionate team at Madison Funeral Home. Serving multiple locations with integrity, we provide personalized guidance when you need it most. Find a trusted professional near you.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Contact Madison Funeral Home for prompt, empathetic assistance. Whether planning ahead or in immediate need, our team is here to answer questions and provide comfort. Call or message us today.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Madison Funeral Home
Madison Funeral Home is a full-service funeral provider located in Madison, NY, offering compassionate end-of-life services including casket selection, floral arrangements, candles, and video tributes. The business operates across multiple locations and features a dedicated funeral team. Their website would need to reflect dignity, warmth, and trust, with key features like obituary listings and service information for grieving families.

## Target Audience
- Families and individuals in Madison, NY seeking funeral services
- Local Families in Madison
- Elderly Caregivers
- Religious Communities

## Industry
Funeral Services

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
